title: GST Return Filing Service Mumbai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan
description: Expert GST return filing in Mumbai. GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, GSTR-9, ITC reconciliation. Timely filing with zero penalties. Call +91-77000 89597.
bodyText:
Looking for GST return filing services in Mumbai? Virtual Auditor provides comprehensive monthly and annual GST return filing in Mumbai, led by CA V. Viswanathan — Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA). We handle GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, GSTR-9, GSTR-9C, and all other GST returns with timely filing and ITC optimisation.

What is GST Return Filing Service Mumbai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Monthly GSTR-1 filing (outward supply details) with invoice-wise data entry and HSN summary. Monthly GSTR-3B filing (summary return) with accurate tax computation and ITC claim. ITC reconciliation between GSTR-2A/2B and your purchase records to maximise legitimate ITC claims. Annual return (GSTR-9) preparation with turnover reconciliation and HSN-wise summary. GSTR-9C reconciliation statement (for turnover above Rs 5 crores) certified by CA. E-invoicing compliance monitoring and e-way bill reconciliation.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for GST Return Filing in Mumbai
  Late GST filing attracts Rs 50 per day late fee (Rs 20 for nil returns) and interest at 18% per annum on outstanding tax. ITC mismatches between GSTR-2A and GSTR-3B trigger demand notices that can escalate to penalties under Section 73/74. Virtual Auditor ensures timely filing with proactive ITC reconciliation — we identify mismatches before they become demands. Our Mumbai office provides in-person support for complex reconciliation issues. We handle multi-state filing for businesses with registrations across multiple states, ensuring consistent treatment and consolidated ITC management. Our monthly process includes vendor follow-up for missing invoices in GSTR-2A, ensuring you claim every rupee of legitimate ITC.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Monthly data collection — sales invoices, purchase invoices, bank statements, expense records. Step 2: Invoice-wise data entry and HSN classification for GSTR-1. Step 3: ITC reconciliation — matching purchases with GSTR-2A/2B data, identifying mismatches. Step 4: Tax computation and GSTR-3B preparation with ITC claim optimisation. Step 5: Filing before due dates (11th for GSTR-1, 20th for GSTR-3B). Step 6: Monthly compliance report — tax summary, ITC status, mismatch alerts. Step 7: Annual return preparation and CA-certified GSTR-9C at year-end.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Need reliable GST return filing in Mumbai? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-77000 89597
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062
  Competitive monthly packages. No missed deadlines.

faqs.q: What is the cost of monthly GST return filing in Mumbai?
faqs.a: Monthly filing fees start from Rs 1,500/month for small businesses. Pricing depends on transaction volume, number of invoices, and states of registration. Contact us at +91-77000 89597 for a customised quote.

faqs.q: What happens if GST returns are filed late?
faqs.a: Late filing attracts a fee of Rs 50/day (Rs 20/day for nil returns) capped at Rs 5,000 per return under Section 47. Additionally, interest at 18% per annum applies on outstanding tax under Section 50. Continuous non-filing for 6 months can lead to GST registration cancellation.

faqs.q: Can you handle GST return filing for multiple states from Mumbai?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle multi-state GST compliance from our Mumbai office. Each state's returns are filed separately with state-specific reconciliation. Consolidated reporting is provided for management review.
